Visioner 🇵🇰 The Chief of Army Staff of Pakistan, Field Marshal Asim Munir, and the Interior Minister, Mohsin Naqvi, arrived this morning in Tehran, the capital of Iran. The visit precedes the planned resumption of peace talks with the United States in Islamabad during the upcoming holidays. 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡️ — According to Axios, US and Iranian negotiators are nearing a possible agreement. Vance, Steve Whitkoff, and Jared Kushner, continue discussions and exchange proposals with Iran and intermediaries. ➡️ Officials are hopeful but cautious, as intermediaries from Pakistan, Egypt, and Turkey try to bring positions closer before the April 21 ceasefire deadline. tweet

WarTranslated Russia's Gazprom has delivered its second shipment of liquefied natural gas from the Baltic "Portovaya" plant to China since sanctions were lifted, according to LSEG data. The LNG carrier Valera took on the cargo at the plant on January 25 and delivered it to the Beihai LNG terminal on Wednesday. Another sanctioned Russian facility, "Arctic LNG 2," is also supplying gas to the Beihai terminal. https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/russia-delivers-second-post-sanctions-lng-cargo-portovaya-china-data-shows-2026-04-15/ tweet

OSINTdefender U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) has posted a video of a U.S. warship making a broadcast on marine VHF channel 16 to ships about the blockade of Iran: "The U.S. has announced a formal blockade of Iranian ports and coastal areas. This is a legal action. All vessels are advised to immediately return to port if leaving and discontinue transit to Iran if that is your next port of call. Do not attempt to breach the blockade. Vessels will be boarded for interdiction and seizure transiting to or from an Iranian port. Turn around or prepare to be boarded. If you do not comply with this blockade, we will use force. The whole of the United States Navy is ready to force compliance. Out." Marine VHF 16 is the international hailing channel for ships at sea. tweet

Visioner 🇭🇺 Hungary’s future Prime Minister, Péter Magyar, stated live on air that immediately after forming a new cabinet, Orbán’s main propagandistic “public broadcaster” will be shut down. 📌 “Before we begin, let me note how strange all this is. ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel IDF Chief of Staff LTG Eyal Zamir, visiting the 162nd Division in southern Lebanon: "Yesterday I approved further plans together with the General Staff Forum. We continue to conduct ongoing situational assessments and approve plans, both in Lebanon and in Iran. In a joint operation with the United States military, we struck the Iranian terror regime severely, stripping it of its defensive capabilities and weakening it. We must not allow it to achieve gains on the nuclear front, in the Strait of Hormuz, or in other matters on the agenda. We are in a very high state of readiness. Air Force aircraft are armed and prepared, and targets are loaded into the systems — we know how to command them for a powerful strike immediately. In Lebanon, we continue to strike Hezbollah in a multi-front effort. We have eliminated over 1,700 Hezbollah terrorists since the beginning of the operation — this is a severe blow to the terrorist organization. At this time, we continue operations in Bint Jbeil by the troops of the 98th Division, and we are working to dismantle terror threats in the Beit Leaf area by troops of the 162nd Division. In addition, troops from three additional divisions are stabilizing the forward defense area as defined. I have instructed that the entire area of southern Lebanon up to the Litani River become a no-go zone for Hezbollah operatives. We are advancing, striking Hezbollah, and they are withdrawing. Hezbollah is weakened and isolated in Lebanon." tweet

Washington is pressing Israel to agree to a ceasefire and set a date for negotiations – a direct result of US pressure after the Lebanon‑Israel meeting. Israel’s ambassador to the U.S., Yechiel Leiter, spoke at length with the U.S. ambassador to Lebanon, promoting tourism and economic ties. ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Footage shows the large‑scale demolition of the central urban district (Casbah) of Bint Jbeil, southern Lebanon, using controlled charges. The IDF has seemingly established control over most of the city, including its outskirts and key positions. Bint Jbeil, long dubbed Hezbollah’s “Capital of the Resistance” and the site of Hassan Nasrallah’s 2000 “spider web” speech, has now seen its historic core levelled. @wfwitness

The vessel, bound for Malaysia, reportedly sank due to heavy winds, rough seas, and overcrowding after departing from southern Bangladesh. Nine people have been rescued so far. @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 British Prime Minister Starmer reiterated that he won’t yield to pressure to join the U.S.’s conflict with Iran. "My position on the Iran war has been clear from the start. I'm not going to change my mind. I'm not going to yield. It is not in our national interest to join this war, and we will not do so. I know where I stand." @wfwitness

NEW: Satellite images show Iran using heavy equipment to dig out missile launchers trapped in underground tunnels during the ceasefire. Recent US intelligence estimates that roughly half of Iran’s missile launchers remain intact after a month of fighting. Many were likely buried by US and Israeli strikes on tunnel entrances, and Iran now appears to be recovering them. Source: CNN

Israeli Ambassador to the U.S. Yechiel Leiter on Lebanon talks: We certainly don’t want the French anywhere near these negotiations. We’d like to keep the French as far away as possible from pretty much everything. They’re not needed. They’re not a positive influence.
